meta.description: GLSL/WebGL shader parameters for recreating the New Age Glam Fantasy aesthetic. Values are normalized (0.0–1.0) unless otherwise noted.
meta.usage: Load these parameters into your shader app, GLSL uniforms, or post-processing pipeline. Each section corresponds to a distinct visual effect layer.

color_palette.description: Core palette as normalized RGB for GPU uniforms

color_grading.description: LUT-style color grading parameters. Apply as color matrix or curves in post.
color_grading.temperature_note: Slightly cool; push toward 5500K for warmer VHS feel

bloom.note: Heavy bloom is characteristic. Do not reduce below 0.40 intensity for on-model results.

halation.description: Film halation — glow around bright areas bleeding into surroundings

vhs_softness.chroma_softness_note: Chroma channels blur more than luma in VHS

chroma_bleed.description: Analog color channel misregistration and bleed
chroma_bleed.edge_only_note: Apply strongest bleed at high-contrast edges
chroma_bleed.dominant_bleed_colors_note: Magenta bleeds into adjacent areas, cyan fringes on opposing edges

crt_scanlines.curvature_note: Very subtle screen curve. Increase to 0.05 for heavier CRT feel.

film_grain.animation_speed_note: Frame rate for grain animation if applied to video

diffusion.description: Optical diffusion filter simulation (Pro-Mist / Glimmerglass style)
diffusion.note: Diffusion should feel like shooting through a net or fog filter, not plain blur

lens_distortion.description: Slight barrel distortion for vintage lens feel
lens_distortion.enabled_note: Disable for most work. Enable only for heavy vintage lens look.

vignette.color_note: Very dark violet vignette rather than pure black

color_aberration.description: Prismatic color fringing on high-contrast edges

analog_fade.description: Faded print / aged media overall tone shift
analog_fade.fade_color_note: Fade toward lavender-white, not plain white

level_1_whispered.description: Subtle — elegant portraits, cleaner glamour scenes

level_2_clear_memory.description: Default — most New Age Glam Fantasy work

level_3_heavy_relic.description: Heavy — explicit VHS / lost media / degraded archive

glsl_uniforms.description: GLSL uniform variable names for integration into shader code
glsl_uniforms.u_bloom_threshold: float — luma threshold for bloom (0.0 to 1.0)
glsl_uniforms.u_bloom_radius: float — bloom spread radius in pixels
glsl_uniforms.u_chroma_r_offset: vec2 — red channel offset in pixels
glsl_uniforms.u_chroma_b_offset: vec2 — blue channel offset in pixels
glsl_uniforms.u_grain_time: float — time uniform for animated grain
glsl_uniforms.u_time: float — time in seconds for animated effects

steps: Add Curves adjustment: lift shadows slightly toward violet, boost pink/blue highlights
Add Lens Blur (5–12px) on luminance channel for diffusion
Apply VHS horizontal motion blur (Smart Sharpen > Lens Blur, horizontal)
Add Gradient Map overlay at 15–25% opacity using pink→violet→teal gradient
Add Noise overlay at 4–8% for grain
Screen-mode glow layer: Gaussian blur copy at 30–40% opacity
Add slight chroma aberration via Channel offset (R: +1-2px, B: -1-2px)

effects: VHS effect plugins (Video Copilot, Magic Bullet Frames)

nodes: Color Warper: push shadows to violet, highlights to pink/blue
Film Grain: Fine grain at 10–20% intensity
Halation: Resolve Color Science halation setting

operators: GLSL TOP for custom chroma and scanline
